title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: TALENT BOYS & GIRLS CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive and safe place for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 307 W Wagner Creek Road Room 14 Talent, OR 97540 Eligibility: Grades K-8 Hours: Monday-Friday: 2:30pm-6pm Email (541) 292-4851 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 292-4851 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Annual membership fee is $40 per child. $25 per week: Kindergarden-1st grade $50 per child (multi-child discounts and scholarships available): Grades 2nd-5th Programs for middle and high school aged students are free. Scholarships available upon request. Additonal fees for team sports and non-school days. Monthly program fee is $30 per child (with multi-child discounts available). Scholarships available upon request. Additional fees for team sports and non-school days. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Tutoring Services Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SUMMER PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
